scanningRotationLines: Patience is not the ability to wait, but the ability to keep a good attitude while waiting - Joyce Meyer
The two most powerful warriors are patience and time - Leo Tolstoy
Rivers know this: there is no hurry. We shall get there some day - A.A. Milne
Great things come to those who wait - English Proverb
Waiting is a period of grace to prepare for the glory - Lailah Gifty Akita
Patience is the calm acceptance that things can happen in a different order than the one you have in mind - David G. Allen
He that can have patience can have what he will - Benjamin Franklin
The key to everything is patience. You get the chicken by hatching the egg, not by smashing it - Arnold H. Glasow
Waiting is not merely empty time. It is the way as well as the end - David Steindl-Rast
Trees that are slow to grow bear the best fruit - Moliere
The strongest of all warriors are these two — Time and Patience - Leo Tolstoy
Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet - Jean-Jacques Rousseau
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished - Lao Tzu
To wait is to grow in the quietest of ways - Tommy Bacon
Patience is the art of hoping - Luc de Clapiers
The wait makes the arrival worth the journey - Nelson Mandela
Wisdom is knowing when to move and when to wait - Socrates
He who is a master of patience is master of everything else - George Savile
Wait for the right moment and the universe will conspire with you - Paulo Coelho
The best things in life are worth the wait - Anonymous
Patience is the companion of wisdom - Saint Augustine
Waiting is the brush that paints the masterpiece of character - Anonymous
To know how to wait is the great secret of success - Fontenelle
In the waiting, we find the strength we didn't know we had - Anonymous
Patience is power. Patience is not an absence of action; rather it is 'timing' - Fulton J. Sheen
Everything comes to him who hustles while he waits - Thomas Edison
The soul grows thick in the waiting - Ralph Waldo Emerson
A quiet wait is a loud victory over the ego - Anonymous
Genius is nothing but a great aptitude for patience - George-Louis de Buffon
Patience is the knot that holds the dream together - Anonymous
Waiting is the soil where endurance takes root - Anonymous
Do not mistake a season of waiting for a season of defeat - Anonymous
The finest steel has to go through the hottest fire and the longest wait - Richard M. Nixon
There is something beautiful in the wait that the destination cannot offer - Anonymous
Silence is the wait that speaks the loudest - Rumi
Patience is the bridge between the dream and the reality - Anonymous
God has a perfect timing; never early, never late - Anonymous
The beauty of a flower is the result of a long wait in the dark - Anonymous
Waiting is a virtue that refines the heart - Anonymous
One minute of patience, ten years of peace - Greek Proverb
Patience and fortitude conquer all things - Ralph Waldo Emerson
In every wait, there is a lesson of light - Anonymous
Success is a slow process and waiting is the engine - Anonymous
The heart grows wise in the stillness of the wait - Anonymous
Patience is a form of courage - Anonymous
Waiting is the silent teacher of self-control - Anonymous
A moment of patience can ward off great disaster - Chinese Proverb
Good things take time, great things take a little longer - Anonymous
The harder the wait, the sweeter the reward - Anonymous
Patience is the strength of the spirit - Anonymous
Waiting is the discipline of the vision - Anonymous
Endurance is patience concentrated - Thomas Carlyle
The secret of patience is to do something else in the meantime - Anonymous
Waiting makes the soul lean and the mind sharp - Anonymous
To wait is to trust the rhythm of life - Anonymous
Patience is the key that opens the door to happiness - Anonymous
In the space between waiting and arriving, life happens - Anonymous
The longest wait produces the strongest roots - Anonymous
Wait for the dust to settle to see the path clearly - Anonymous
Patience is the ability to idle your motor when you feel like stripping your gears - Anonymous
Waiting is the laboratory of the soul - Anonymous
The world belongs to the patient - Italian Proverb
Patience is a minor form of despair, disguised as a virtue - Ambrose Bierce
Waiting builds a hunger that only excellence can satisfy - Anonymous
Patience is the support of weakness; impatience the ruin of strength - Charles Caleb Colton
To wait is to gather the strength to leap - Anonymous
The virtue of waiting is the foundation of character - Anonymous
A person who is a master of patience is master of everything else - Anonymous
Waiting is the price of admission for greatness - Anonymous
Patience is the road to wisdom - Anonymous
In the waiting, we learn the art of being - Anonymous
The slow path is often the surest path - Anonymous
Waiting is the gestation of a miracle - Anonymous
Patience is the companion of joy - Anonymous
To wait with hope is to live with purpose - Anonymous
The harvest is worth the season of waiting - Anonymous
Patience is the jewelry of the soul - Anonymous
Wait until your mind is still and your heart is open - Anonymous
The art of waiting is the art of living - Anonymous
Patience is a conquering virtue - Anonymous
The wait is the training ground for the champion - Anonymous
Waiting is the anchor in the storm of haste - Anonymous
Patience is the mother of luck - Spanish Proverb
To wait is to honor the process - Anonymous
The strength of a man is found in his ability to wait - Anonymous
Patience is the garment of the wise - Anonymous
Wait for the inner voice to speak - Anonymous
The discipline of waiting is the discipline of success - Anonymous
Patience is the master of time - Anonymous
In the waiting, the truth reveals itself - Anonymous
The fruit of patience is the sweetest of all - Anonymous
Waiting is the silence before the symphony - Anonymous
Patience is the power to stay when everyone else leaves - Anonymous
To wait is to refine the gold of the heart - Anonymous
The best views come after the longest climb and the longest wait - Anonymous
Patience is the root of all glory - Anonymous
Waiting is the breath between the notes of a song - Anonymous
Patience is the steady hand of the archer - Anonymous
To wait is to become who you were meant to be - Anonymous
The wait is the gift you give to your future self - Anonymous

documentReviewToolbar.removeFileAriaLabel: Remove file and return to upload
documentReviewToolbar.confirmRemoveMessage: Are you sure? The file will be removed and you will return to the upload step.
